title: Wait For The Delayed Alert
goal: Trigger the delayed alert on the DemoQA alerts page and stop after the alert appears five seconds later.
instruction: Open the DemoQA alerts page, trigger the delayed alert, wait for it to appear, and stop after it has been observed.
review_notes: Delayed-alert task on DemoQA. The agent must wait for a transient browser alert and the benchmark verifies it through trace notes.

success_assertions.value: dialog: alert - This alert appeared after 5 seconds

steps.explanation: I triggered the delayed alert and waited for it to appear.

action.summary: I triggered the delayed alert and stopped after it appeared.

steps.explanation: The delayed alert has already appeared, so I am ending the task.
